CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2003 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2002 Continued To Feb-18-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 5, 2002.
Off Calendar Nov-05-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hearing on Petition approving compromise of minor's claim. Petitioner represented by Roger L. Sisneros, Esq. This matter was previously heard on October 1, 2002 at which time the $35,000.00 compromise was approved but the figures stated in the Order did not match that amount. The Court takes evidence and grants the petition approving the claim as follows: Kaiser Permanente: $2,539.00; Cal. Pacific Medical: $244.00; Marin Radiology: $79.00; Attorney Fees: $7,886.00 and the net balance of $20,793.00 into a blocked until minor's 18th birthday. Order approving compromise and order to deposit money into blocked account signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise On Calendar In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On October 1, 2002.
Off Calendar Oct-01-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Maureen Howard. Roger L. Sisneros, Esq. represented the plaintiff. Also, present counsel for the Defendant, Deanne J.Broglia. Court takes evidence and good cause appearing, signs the order approving compromise of claim as follows: Compromise: $35,000.00; Costs: $3,457.60; Fees: $7,885.60; Medical liens: $2,152.00 and the net balance of $21,504.80 to be deposited into a blocked account until age 18.
